source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Back-end and Full-stack)
source_jobs.description:
🔍 ABOUT US

CorePlan is a product-led SaaS company building modern operational software for the mining industry.

We design and scale a cloud-native platform used by global customers to manage complex, real-time field operations. Our system replaces fragmented tools and spreadsheets with a single, high-performance product that handles critical operational data at scale.

Mining is our domain. Technology is our craft.

We are a high-performing, execution-focused team building a category-defining SaaS platform from Perth to the world.




💼 THE OPPORTUNITY

We are growing our engineering team and hiring:

● 1 x Backend Engineer

● 1 x Full-Stack Engineer




🔧 BACKEND ENGINEER

You will focus on building scalable, reliable backend systems that power our platform.

What You Will Do

 - Design and implement scalable backend services and APIs that power our drilling management platform

 - Architect robust data models and optimise database performance for complex mining datasets

 - Build and maintain microservices that integrate with various drilling equipment and third-party systems

 - Implement security best practices and ensure data integrity across all backend systems

 - Drive performance optimisation and system reliability to support 24/7 mining operations

 - Collaborate with frontend teams to deliver seamless user experiences

 - Mentor junior developers and contribute to backend architecture decisions

 - Embrace CorePlan's collaborative ethos, working alongside a dedicated team to achieve shared goals
   
   
   
   You Will Bring

 - Strong experience with Typescript (Node.js), Python, or similar

 - Deep understanding of API design and distributed systems

 - Experience with PostgreSQL or similar databases

 - Cloud deployment experience (AWS preferred)

 - Experience with CI/CD and containerised environments
   
   


💻 FULL-STACK ENGINEER

You will own features end to end, from UI through to backend integration.

What You Will Do

 - Design and deliver high-performance features

 - Work across frontend and backend services

 - Collaborate closely with product and design

 - Improve engineering tools and processes

 - Contribute to code quality and peer reviews
   
   


YOU WILL BRING

 - Strong experience with Typescript (Node.js), Python, or similar

 - Backend experience with Node.js, Python, or similar

 - Experience building production SaaS applications

 - Cloud deployment knowledge

 - Comfort working across the full stack
   
   


🧰 OUR TECH STACK

Backend: NestJS (Node.js), Django (Python), TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS
Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind
Mobile: React Native




🚀 KEY ENGINEERING PROJECTS

You will work on initiatives such as:

 - Scaling our multi-tenant SaaS architecture to support global growth

 - Designing high-performance APIs for complex operational datasets

 - Improving system reliability in 24/7 mission-critical environments

 - Evolving our microservices architecture for resilience and observability

 - Building real-time data flows between field hardware and cloud systems

 - Enhancing database performance across large relational datasets

 - Strengthening CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation

 - This is product engineering at scale, with real-world impact.




🎁 PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Central CBD location - in state of art offices

 - Hybrid role - blending deep focus time with collaboration and connection

 - Vibrant office culture and team events (monthly all hands, lunch and learns, office pilates, office jukebox + more)

 - Corporate swag

 - Parental leave top-up pay (covering the difference between the government's minimum parental leave payment and your regular base salary)

 - Access to EAP mental health & wellbeing services for you and immediate family members
   
   


🚀 READY TO APPLY?

Tell us which stream you are applying for – Backend or Full-Stack - and share your CV and a short cover letter outlining what you love building.




🤝 RECRUITMENT AGENCI

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive - North America
source_jobs.description:
Location: Vancouver, BC (hybrid role)
Compensation and Benefits package: $200k OTE+ Health Insurance, 4 weeks of vacation leave per year

About the opportunity

CorePlan is a fast-growing Perth-based SaaS startup transforming how mining and drilling operations run through our modern digital drilling management platform. As we expand across North America, we’re looking for a high-performing Senior Account Executive ready to drive new business, influence strategy, and help shape our future sales team.

This is a rare chance to join an ambitious, execution-focused company and play a pivotal role in scaling a category-defining solution.



THE ROLE

This role is responsible for driving customer acquisition by actively prospecting, qualifying leads, and executing tailored outbound sales campaigns. You will manage the end-to-end sales cycle using CorePlan's methodology, ensuring a seamless experience for prospects and customers. Staying informed on industry trends, attending customer-facing events, and maintaining accurate reporting and documentation are key.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Manage the full sales cycle from discovery to close with a consultative, SPICED-driven approach.

 - Prospect, qualify, and nurture leads using CorePlan’s target lists and industry insights.

 - Conduct structured discovery to uncover operational challenges and align tailored drilling management solutions.

 - Deliver compelling demos to technical, operational, and executive-level stakeholders.

 - Maintain strong sales velocity while navigating longer, multi-stakeholder cycles typical in mining and industrial operations.

 - Mentor and support team members by sharing best practices and elevating sales execution.

 - Analyze pipeline and deal data to increase win rates and improve forecasting accuracy.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Marketing, and Customer Success to ensure a seamless buyer journey and customer experience.

 - Represent CorePlan at conferences, tradeshows, and customer-facing events across North America.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 5+ years of B2B sales experience in SaaS and/or Mining/Industrial sectors.

 - Proven success in mid-market or multi-stakeholder sales cycles.

 - Consistent track record of exceeding annual quotas.

 - Strong discovery, presentation, and closing abilities with a consultative mindset.

 - Proficiency with SPICED, MEDDIC, Challenger, SPIN, or similar methodologies.

 - Experience mentoring or informally leading peers.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

 - Exposure to mining, drilling, or field-service workflows is highly advantageous.


WHY THIS ROLE?

 - Sell a platform that delivers operational gains to a high-value industry - CorePlan helps mining and drilling contractors lift visibility, reduce admin, and streamline operations early in their journey

 - Own the full sales cycle - from prospecting to closing

 - High-growth startup environment transforming mining and drilling operations

 - Cross-functional collaboration with Sales, Product, and Customer teams

 - Industry-facing presence at tradeshows, conferences, and customer events
   


RECRUITMENT AGENCIES

We appreciate your hustle, but we’re not engaging agencies right now. Want to be on our radar for the future? Email careers@coreplan.io

source_jobs.title: EOI - Customer Success / Implementations Manager
source_jobs.description:
🔍 About Us

CorePlan is a Perth, Western Australia based tech startup shaking up the mining industry with a modern digital SaaS drilling management platform. We replace paper and spreadsheets with a seamless solution used by customers worldwide. Our mission is to advance digital drilling operations across mining, and our momentum is strong. We are a high-performing team of self-starters building the next generation of mining software, and we are expanding internationally.



💼 The Role

We are opening expressions of interest for a detail-oriented Customer Success Manager, This role will focus primarily on implementations and onboarding, ensuring smooth transitions from sale to full platform adoption for our clients.



📋 Key responsibilities

 - Lead end-to-end presales and implementation projects from kick-off to go-live

 - Develop and execute detailed project plans tailored to each customer's needs

 - Configure the CorePlan platform to meet specific customer requirements

 - Conduct thorough data migration and validation processes

 - Design and deliver customised training programs for various user roles

 - Manage project timelines, milestones, and resources to ensure on-time, successful deployments

 - Collaborate virtually with our global team to address customer-specific needs

 - Create and maintain project best practices and playbooks

 - Provide post-implementation support to ensure smooth adoption and resolve any issues

 - Conduct regular check-ins and health checks with assigned accounts

 - Work autonomously while maintaining strong communication with the team
   
   

You will thrive in this role if you have:

 - Minimum 3 years’ experience in Customer Success, project management or consulting, ideally in SaaS

 - Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering or similar (preferred)

 - Proven track record of successfully implementing complex software solutions

 - Strong project management skills with ability to manage multiple implementations simultaneously

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders at all levels

 - Technical aptitude with the ability to quickly learn and become proficient in new technologies

 - Experience working in a global team environment and collaborating across time zones

 - Problem-solving mindset with a talent for finding creative solutions to customer challenges

 - Experience with CRM and project management tools

 - Experience in mining industry will be helpful but not necessary
   
   

🎁 Why our team love working here

 - High‑impact role in a product‑led, fast‑growing company expanding internationally.

 - Close partnership with customers who deeply care about what we build.

 - Supportive, outcome‑driven team with plenty of autonomy.

 - Access to EAP mental health & wellbeing services for you and immediate family members
   
   

🚀 Ready for your next adventure?

If you are keen to bring your A-game to a tech-forward startup, we invite you to submit an expression of interest with your CV and cover letter.

Have questions? Reach out to us at careers@coreplan.io



🤝 Recruitment Agencies

We appreciate your hustle, but we’re not engaging agencies right now. Want to be on our radar for the future? Email careers@coreplan.io

source_jobs.title: EOI - Customer Success Manager, Implementations
source_jobs.description:
🔍 ABOUT US

CorePlan is a Perth, Western Australia based tech startup shaking up the mining industry with a modern digital SaaS drilling management platform. We replace paper and spreadsheets with a seamless solution used by customers worldwide. Our mission is to advance digital drilling operations across mining, and our momentum is strong. We are a high-performing team of self-starters building the next generation of mining software, and we are expanding internationally.




💼 THE ROLE

We are looking for an Implementation Specialist to drive successful customer onboarding and deliver high-quality implementations from presales through to adoption. You will work closely with the sales, CS team members and other internal stakeholders to ensure a seamless transition from sale to full platform adoption. Your role is key in managing the project details that contribute to timely customer onboarding and high post-implementation satisfaction.




📋 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Implementation & delivery

 - Support and coordinate end-to-end presales and implementation projects

 - Keep projects on track against key timelines (e.g. 60–120 day implementations)

 - Ensure a seamless handover from Sales to Customer Success

 - Flag risks early and keep projects moving forward

Reporting & data

 - Keep CRM and internal systems accurate and up to date

 - Share regular updates on progress, milestones, and customer feedback

 - Capture insights to improve onboarding and post-implementation experience

Collaboration & improvement

 - Work cross-functionally to deliver a consistent customer experience

 - Contribute to playbooks and continuously improve how we implement

 - Help shape scalable processes as we grow

Customer support

 - Step in to support customers when needed, helping resolve issues quickly

 - Work with the team to improve support processes and response times

 - Deliver a smooth, high-quality experience at every touchpoint




YOU WILL THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IF YOU HAVE:

 - Minimum 3 years’ experience in software implementation, project management or consulting, ideally in SaaS

 - Experience in mining industry will be highly regarded

 - Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering or similar (preferred)

 - Proven track record of successfully implementing complex software solutions

 - Strong project management skills with ability to manage multiple implementations simultaneously

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders at all levels

 - Technical aptitude with the ability to quickly learn and become proficient in new technologies

 - Experience working in a global team environment and collaborating across time zones

 - Problem-solving mindset with a talent for finding creative solutions to customer challenges

 - Experience with CRM and project management tools

 - Fluent in English and Portuguese (written and spoken)

 - Spanish is highly preferred
   
   


🚀 READY FOR YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE?

If you are keen to bring your A-game to a tech-forward startup, we invite you to submit an expression of interest with your CV and cover letter.

Have questions? Reach out to us at careers@coreplan.io




🤝 RECRUITMENT AGENCIES

We appreciate your hustle, but we’re not engaging agencies right now. Want to be on our radar for the future? Email careers@coreplan.io

source_jobs.title: Integration Specialist
source_jobs.description:
🔍 About CorePlan

CorePlan is a Perth-based SaaS company modernising the global mining industry. Our drilling management platform replaces paper and spreadsheets with a seamless digital solution used by mining and drilling companies worldwide - from mid-tier explorers to major miners globally. We are a high-performing, self-starting team building the next generation of mining software, growing fast and expanding internationally.



💼 The Role

Integration Specialist - what the industry is increasingly calling a Forward-Deployed Engineer. This is not a support role or a project management role. It is for someone who can deep-dive into a customer's technical environment in the morning and explain data lineage to their operations team in the afternoon.



We are looking for someone who has been through enough difficult integrations to know what breaks, and enough customer conversations to know how to prevent it.



You will join CorePlan's Integrations team as a delivery owner, taking end-to-end ownership of customer and partner integrations - from discovery and architecture through to production support. Our customers connect CorePlan to drilling platforms, ERPs, GIS systems, sensors, data warehouses and more. The data is messy, the stakes are real, and the work is genuinely interesting. The role will involve occasional travel to customer sites.



Tech stack: Python, SQL, RESTful APIs, OAuth, JSON, event-driven and file-based pipelines. Exposure to AWS/Azure and Snowflake is a plus.



📋 What You'll Do

 - Own end-to-end delivery of customer and partner integrations - from discovery and technical design through to go-live and ongoing production support.

 - Design and implement robust, data-heavy integrations using CorePlan APIs, events, and data platforms, with a strong focus on data validity, traceability, and auditability.

 - Translate customer operational workflows (planning, drilling, dispatch, billing, GIS etc.) into clear technical requirements and build reusable, configurable, maintainable integration patterns and solutions.

 - Work directly with customers and partners during discovery, testing, and go-live - you are the technical face of the integration. What you learn in customer delivery shapes CorePlan's integration architecture and influences product direction

 - Collaborate with Product and Engineering to protect core product boundaries and shape how integration patterns scale across customers

 - Reduce escalation load and build documentation and standards that make the team's integrations supportable, not just deliverable



✅ What You'll Bring

Essential

 - 8+ years of career experience, with at least 2 years in both integration delivery and direct customer-facing work

 - Demonstrated experience building and supporting production integrations - APIs, webhooks, event-driven architectures, file-based pipelines, or data platforms

 - Strong Python and SQL; comfortable reasoning about data quality, transformation, and pipeline design

 - Solid understanding of RESTful API design, OAuth authentication, and working with JSON and relational databases

 - Real experience working directly with enterprise customers - gathering requirements, managing expectations, and explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

 - A pragmatic, delivery-focused mindset: you can operate with partial requirements, solve problems, develop solutions safely, and get things done without waiting for perfect conditions

 - Well-developed habits of using AI tools to accelerate your coding, learning, and problem-solving - this is how we work



Highly Desirable

 - Experience in mining, drilling, construction, logistics, or another operationally complex industry - you understand what is at stake when data is wrong

 - Familiarity with enterprise or operational systems: ERPs, GIS platforms, hardware sensors, drilling management software

 - Experience in a SaaS environment where integrations are customer-critical and on-call is

source_jobs.title: Regional Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
Location: Vancouver, BC (hybrid role)
Compensation and Benefits package: $120,000 per annum + Health Insurance, 4 weeks of vacation leave per year



🔍 About Us

CorePlan is a Perth, Western Australia based tech startup shaking up the mining industry with a modern digital SaaS drilling management platform. We replace paper and spreadsheets with a seamless solution used by customers worldwide. Our mission is to advance digital drilling operations across mining, and our momentum is strong. We are a high-performing team of self-starters building the next generation of mining software, and we are expanding internationally.




💼 THE ROLE

We are looking for a strategic and commercially sharp Regional Marketing Manager for the Americas to join our growing team. In this high-impact, generalist role, you will own the Go-To-Market (GTM) strategy for the region, bridging local market context with the capabilities of our HQ function. Based out of our Vancouver office, you will sit alongside a growing in-market revenue team - including a regional sales lead, account executives, customer success managers, and an events specialist.

You will act as the voice of the Americas, collaborating closely with the Marketing Team Lead in Perth across timezones to shape our international expansion. Because the Perth team handles creative production, content, and demand generation, you won't be doing everything yourself; instead, you will provide the critical regional intelligence, strategy, and cross-functional leadership that a team on the other side of the world cannot.




📋 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Co-develop and Execute GTM Strategy: Partner with the Marketing Team Lead to shape the Americas GTM strategy, mapping out the ideal customer profile (ICP), channel mix, messaging, and go-to-market calendar across NORAM and LATAM.

 - Build Brand Credibility: Own how CorePlan shows up and is positioned in the Americas, transforming a complex product into clear messaging that navigates regional competitive dynamics.

 - Drive Pipeline and Demand: Take full ownership of the Americas marketing contribution to influence pipeline dollars, briefing the Perth demand gen team on local context and campaign requirements.

 - Champion Customer Advocacy: Coordinate with the regional Customer Success team to uncover customer stories, building a pipeline of case studies to grow local referenceability.

 - Lead Field Marketing and Events: Direct our Vancouver-based events specialist on event selection and pipeline goals, making strategic decisions on sponsorships and industry associations.

 - Enable the In-Market Revenue Team: Build and maintain an easily accessible library of localized sales enablement tools (battlecards, localized collateral) so the local sales team can run fast without waiting on HQ.




🫵 YOU WILL THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IF YOU HAVE:

 - SaaS Experience: 7 to 10 years of B2B SaaS marketing experience, with substantial time spent in field, regional, or GTM-focused roles.

 - Market-Building Track Record: Proven success building a brand from scratch in an underdeveloped market, with a strong understanding of the NORAM B2B buying cycle.

 - Revenue Mindset: A clear history of owning pipeline contribution as a core success metric, alongside proficiency in CRM and marketing automation tools like HubSpot.

 - High Autonomy: The ability to operate across timezones with a remote HQ, define problems, and progress the plan independently without waiting on instructions.

 - The "Nice-to-Haves": Experience in the mining, resources, or infrastructure technology sectors. Exposure to partner/channel marketing or Spanish/Portuguese language skills for the LATAM market is a significant plus.




🎁 WHY OUR TEAM LOVES WORKING HERE

 - High Impact & Real Autonomy: This is a pivotal role connecting two critical functions; you fully own the regional strategy and execution with the backing of a dedicated production team at HQ.

 - Collaborative & Fast-Paced: Work alongside

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
Location & Workplace Model: Vancouver, BC, Canada (Hybrid) 3 days in office. 2 from home.

Compensation and Benefits package: $75,000-$100,000 OTE per annum + Health Insurance, 4 weeks of vacation leave per year




🔍 ABOUT US

CorePlan is a Perth, Western Australia based tech startup shaking up the mining industry with a modern digital SaaS drilling management platform. We replace paper and spreadsheets with a seamless solution used by customers worldwide. Our mission is to advance digital drilling operations across mining, and our momentum is strong. We are a high-performing team of self-starters building the next generation of mining software, and we are expanding internationally.



We have started to scale globally and looking are looking for an additional team member to join our GTM team based in Vancouver.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Our pipeline starts with you. As a Sales Development Representative at CorePlan, you will be the first conversation our future customers have with us. You will generate and qualify leads, run smart outbound campaigns, and clearly show prospects how our product solves real problems. It is a role with a direct line to the growth of the business, and plenty of room to learn the craft of modern B2B sales.

You will work closely with our marketing, sales, and customer success teams, and hand over well-qualified opportunities to our Account Executives.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Run multichannel outbound campaigns across phone, email, landing pages, and social to build awareness and demand across enterprise and mid-market accounts

 - Get to know our product and our customers well enough to explain, in plain terms, how we meet their needs

 - Qualify leads against our ideal customer profile and document each opportunity before handing it to an Account Executive

 - Partner with marketing, sales, and customer success to shape and sharpen outbound strategy

 - Keep our CRM clean and current, and report on your activity each week

 - Set your goals at the start of each quarter and keep them aligned to where the business is heading




WHAT YOU WILL BRING

 - Strong communication and people skills, with a knack for building rapport quickly

 - Experience in B2B SaaS or technology sales, or another customer-facing role

 - Confidence reaching out to prospects across phone, email, and social

 - A natural curiosity that helps you pick up new products, tools, and industries fast

 - An organised, detail-oriented approach and genuine comfort with CRM systems

 - A proactive, goal-driven mindset and a real team-first attitude

Nice to have

 - A degree in business, marketing, communications, or a related field

 - Familiarity with structured sales qualification frameworks such as SPICED

 - Knowledge of the mining or resources industry
   
   


🎁 WHY OUR TEAM LOVES WORKING HERE

 - High Impact & Real Autonomy: You own the top of our sales pipeline. Every conversation you start shapes our growth, and you have the backing of a dedicated marketing, sales, and customer success team to do it well.

 - Collaborative & Fast-Paced: Work alongside an ambitious, close-knit revenue team in Vancouver while staying deeply connected to a product-led startup team in Perth.

 - Vibrant Culture: Join a supportive, outcomes-driven global environment that values high drive, trust-building, and celebrating wins together.




🚀 READY FOR YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE?

If you are keen to bring your A-game to a tech-forward startup, we invite you to submit an expression of interest with your CV and cover letter. Have questions? Reach out to us at careers@coreplan.io.



Recruitment Agencies: We appreciate your hustle, but we are not engaging agencies right now. Want to be on our radar for the future? Email careers@coreplan.io.
